name: Aargauer Rueblitorte/ Argovia Carrot Cake English
recipeInstructions:
First Step:
- Prepare springform pan
- Wash and shred carrots
- Heat white confectioner's coating and lime juice
- Heat apricot marmalade
Second Step:
- Beat butter and sugar together until smooth
- Add egg yolks one at a time, stirring well after each addition
- Mix in milk, hazelnuts, shredded carrots, and flour
- Whisk egg whites and sugar to form stiff peaks
- Fold the egg white mixture into the carrot batter
- Pour batter into greased and floured springform pan
- Bake at 350°F until set
- Top with apricot marmalade
- Cool in the pan
- Frost top with white confectioner's coating
